About Keep It Clean

Discover the story behind our commitment to crystal clear pools and exceptional service

Our Story

Keep It Clean Pool Services began in 2012 when founder Mike Rodriguez started cleaning pools part-time while studying business management. What started as a way to pay for college quickly became a passion for providing exceptional pool care to families in our community.

After experiencing the frustration of unreliable pool services as a homeowner himself, Mike was determined to build something different—a company that homeowners could truly depend on. He assembled a team of certified professionals who share his commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

Today, we're proud to serve over 500 families across the metro area, maintaining our founding principles of reliability, quality, and personal attention to every pool we service.

Our Mission & Values

We're committed to providing exceptional pool care services that give families more time to enjoy what matters most.

Reliability

We show up when we say we will, every single time. Your pool schedule is our promise to you.

Excellence

We maintain the highest standards in every aspect of our service, from water chemistry to customer care.

Community

We're your neighbors, committed to building lasting relationships with the families we serve.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing the right thing even when no one is watching.

Meet Our Team

Our certified professionals bring years of experience and genuine care to every pool we service.

Mike Rodriguez

Founder & Owner

With over 12 years in pool care, Mike holds certifications from NSPF and CPO. He started Keep It Clean to provide the reliable service he couldn't find as a pool owner himself.

Sarah Chen

Operations Manager

Sarah ensures every client receives consistent, high-quality service. Her background in customer service and pool chemistry keeps our operations running smoothly.

David Thompson

Senior Technician

David specializes in equipment repair and maintenance. His 8 years of experience helps keep pools running efficiently and prevents costly breakdowns.

Maria Gonzalez

Pool Care Specialist

Maria's attention to detail and friendly personality have made her a favorite among our clients. She's certified in water chemistry and pool maintenance.

James Wilson

Equipment Specialist

James handles complex equipment installations and repairs. His technical expertise helps extend the life of pool systems and equipment.

Lisa Park

Customer Care Coordinator

Lisa manages scheduling and client communications, ensuring every customer feels heard and valued. She's the friendly voice behind our customer service.

Why Choose Keep It Clean?

When you choose us, you're choosing a partner committed to your pool's health and your peace of mind.

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection and peace of mind.

12+ Years Experience

Over a decade of experience serving families in our community with reliable pool care.

Certified Professionals

Our team holds certifications from NSPF, CPO, and other industry organizations.

24/7 Emergency Service

Pool emergencies don't wait for business hours. We're here when you need us.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees or surprise charges. What we quote is what you pay.

100% Satisfaction

Your satisfaction is guaranteed. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.

Ready to Experience the Difference?

Join over 500 satisfied customers who trust us with their pool care. Get your free estimate today.

Get Free Estimate Call (555) 123-POOL

Keep It Clean Pool Services

Professional pool cleaning and maintenance services you can trust. Serving our community with reliable, expert care for over a decade.
